summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Rajasthan Mewad Marwad tour page implementation. All major features working correctly with 98% success rate.

ui_bugs.issue: Image URL contains 'udaipur lake palace' but visual verification shows it may not be clearly identifiable as Udaipur lake

passed_tests: Rajasthan page loads at /tours/rajasthan with hero showing 'Rajasthan Mewad Marwad' title
Hero section displays all 3 tags: Royal Heritage, Desert Safari, Forts & Palaces
About This Journey section with image and comprehensive description about Mewad & Marwad regions
Quick Info section with correct Duration (7 / 9 / 15 Days), Starting Point (Abu Road / Bikaner), Trip Type (Heritage & Desert), Ideal For (All Travelers)
All 9 destination cards present: Mount Abu, Udaipur, Chittorgarh, Pushkar & Ajmer, Ranthambore, Jaipur, Bikaner, Jaisalmer, Jodhpur
3-way itinerary toggle working correctly: Mewad Marwad (15D), Mewad + Ranthambore (9D), Marwad Desert (7D)
Full tour correctly shows 15 days in accordion
Mewad + Ranthambore correctly shows 9 days in accordion
Marwad Desert correctly shows 7 days in accordion
Itinerary toggle switches update accordion content correctly
Accordion interaction works (expand/collapse functionality)
CTA banner 'Ready for a Royal Adventure?' with working Enquire Now button
CTA button navigation to home page contact section works correctly
Navbar Tours dropdown shows all 3 domestic tours: Ashtavinayak, Kerala, Rajasthan
Tours dropdown navigation to Rajasthan page works
Home page loads correctly (no regression)
Home page navbar Tours dropdown functionality intact
Mobile navigation works correctly
Mobile Tours menu shows all 3 domestic tours
Mobile Rajasthan tour link present and accessible
Responsive design works on desktop and mobile
All images load successfully (hero, about, 9 destination images)
No critical JavaScript errors
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider updating the About This Journey image to a more clearly identifiable Udaipur lake palace image for better visual representation
